ideation: This sequence mimics a bird taking flight.  The arms start down, then move up and out, ending in a position suggesting wings outstretched.  The slight inward and outward rotation of the arms simulates the flapping motion.  The wrists are subtly adjusted for more natural-looking 'wings'.

frames.beat: arms hang low, ready to take flight
arms lift and extend outwards like nascent wings
wings flap upwards, ready to soar
